author: Vaillant Samuel
subject: v5.0.0
body: # [5.0.0](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/compare/v4.5.2...v5.0.0) (2018-03-06) This new version introduce a complete revamp of the naming and the HTML output of most widgets. The goal of this release is to provide improved semantics to our users. This release also introduces a new CSS naming convention which will be reused across all InstantSearch libraries. This will enable the possibility to develop cross-libraries CSS themes easily. You can find all the informations for the migration [in our documentation](https://community.algolia.com/react-instantsearch/guide/migration_guide_v5).
